news.headline: CASETEAM launches as genAI-native & hybrid-first management consulting firm, integrating advanced genAI & human expertise to tackle complex challenges at unrivaled precision & efficiency.
news.summary: A management consulting firm named CASETEAM has launched in San Jose, California, presenting itself as one of the first genAI-native and hybrid-first firms globally. It integrates genAI technology with human insight and expertise to address intricate issues for various industries. This approach allows CASETEAM to provide exceptional solutions to clients swiftly and accurately. The company promises to revolutionize traditional management consulting methods with its innovative strategies.

news.headline: RiverID introduces FaceID system at Mâs Monumental with Veridas, allowing 85,000 fans easy ticketless entry per match.
news.summary: In Boston, RiverID has introduced a groundbreaking FaceID system at Mâs Monumental, making it the largest application of facial ticketing technology in any football stadium globally. Over 85,000 fans per match will benefit from this secure and efficient ticketless entry method starting next season. The initiative, developed in collaboration with Veridas, a prominent player in biometric technology and digital identity, is set to revolutionize the fan experience at the stadium.

news.headline: Pilot Wave Holdings increased credit facility with Aequum Capital from $6MM to $15MM for technology-focused growth.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 3, 2024, Pilot Wave Holdings, a prominent technology-focused acquisition and growth firm, announced the successful closure of an expansion of their current $6 million credit facility with Aequum Capital, now standing at $15 million. This increase in the credit facility enables Pilot Wave to access additional funds for borrowing purposes and further supports their operations and growth strategy.

news.headline: Alternatives, Inc. Dignity Gala on March 15th will honor Colgate-Palmolive and Somerset County Board. News released in Raritan, N.J. - Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A fundraiser scheduled for March 15th, 2024, in Raritan, N.J., will honor Colgate-Palmolive, The Somerset County Board of Commissioners, and Board Member Joseph Westlein. Alternatives, Inc. has organized the event, celebrating over 30 years of community involvement. The fundraiser aims to recognize the contributions of these entities.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: The US may be around full employment, but need to watch how potential trade, immigration changes could change that.
Fed's Kugler: Job report on Friday may well bounce back given the influence of storms and strikes on the prior report.
DCS Corporation wins prime position on $33B IAC Multiple-Award Contract from DTIC, Pool 1. Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on December 3, 2024, DCS Corporation received a prime contract from the Defense Technology Information Center (DTIC) under Pool 1 of the Information Analysis Center Multiple Award Contract (IAC MAC) program. This award is part of an indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity contract and signifies a notable achievement for DCS Corporation in the defense technology sector.

news.headline: Chemical company launches DURAPONTEX Grip insole for athlete control; high-performance solution for movement control.
news.summary: Leading foam manufacturer, Dahsheng Chemical (DSC®), has introduced their new product, DURAPONTEX Grip® in Portland, Ore., on Dec. 3, 2024. This innovative solution provides high-performance movement control. The product is designed to offer superior gripping capabilities for various applications. Dahsheng Chemical continues to be a key player in the industry, with an extensive range of foam products that cater to different market needs. This latest launch aims to address the demand for enhanced movement control, utilizing cutting-edge technology. Stay updated for more details on this groundbreaking development.

news.headline: A Step to Freedom's Warm the Streets LA marks 10 years and receives $1 million HUD grant for housing and homeless services.
news.summary: A Step to Freedom (ASF) in Los Angeles is commemorating the 10th anniversary of its Warm the Streets LA initiative with the announcement of a substantial $1 million grant from the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development's Community Project Funding for Fiscal Year 2024.

news.headline: Forté Orthopedic Research Institute's Hearts 2 Soles event in Indianapolis offers free foot exams, shoes, and socks for needy individuals to address foot health issues.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on December 3, 2024, the Forté Orthopedic Research Institute addressed the prevalent issue of foot health among individuals facing severe poverty and homelessness in Indiana and globally. The institute invites media coverage of the Hearts 2 Soles event, held in collaboration with partners.

news.headline: 65 counterparties take $161.572b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Fed's Kugler: High rate of business formation could keep boosting productivity, but need to be attentive to how other policies may change that.
Stocks could be impacted by Trump's tariff threats sooner than expected.
GENYOUth adds 2 new board members in 2024, co-founded by dairy farmers and NFL, ensuring well-nourished kids.
news.summary: Announced on December 3, 2024, in New York, GENYOUth, a nonprofit organization founded by US dairy farmers and the National Football League (NFL) to promote healthy and active lifestyles among schoolchildren, named a new appointee. This initiative aims to support children's well-being through proper nutrition and physical activity.

news.headline: Tokenization could reshape finance with increasing interest in tokenized assets. Institutional investors looking to diversify portfolios.
news.summary: David Alderman from Franklin Templeton believes that tokenization has the potential to transform institutional investing, although there are barriers to its widespread adoption. Speaking at Benzinga’s Future of Digital Assets alongside Jennifer O'Rourke of DTCC Digital Assets, Alderman discussed how this technology could create a more interconnected market. He emphasized that tokenized assets are gaining traction, enabling institutions to diversify their portfolios and simplify transactions. While acknowledging that tokenization is still in its early phases, Alderman noted the keen interest from institutional investors in exploring its possibilities. Despite the obstacles, he highlighted the eagerness of institutional investors to get involved, stating that most of them are looking to incorporate tokenization into their strategies.

news.headline: Georgia-Pacific donated a fully furnished room to Ronald McDonald House in Camden, NJ. A heartwarming gesture to help families in need.
news.summary: A generous donation has been made by Georgia-Pacific as they have recently provided a fully furnished room to the Ronald McDonald House of Southern New Jersey. The donation was valued at $10,000 and serves as a heartfelt contribution to support families in need. This kind gesture showcases Georgia-Pacific's commitment to giving back to the community.

news.headline: Evive Brands celebrates all 4 brands named in Franchise Dictionary Magazine's Top 100 Game Changers of 2024.
news.summary: Evive Brands revealed on December 3, 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona, that all of its four brands - Assisted Living Locators, Executive Home Care, Grasons, and The Brothers that just do Gutters - have earned spots in the Top 100 Game Changers in 2024 list by Franchise Dictionary Magazine.

news.headline: AWS and GitLab partner to offer integrated AI solution for developers, combining GitLab Duo with Amazon Q for enhanced DevSecOps; aims to boost productivity.
news.summary: In a recent announcement at AWS re:Invent, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), and GitLab Inc. (NASDAQ: GTLB) revealed a new collaboration. This partnership introduces an integrated solution merging GitLab Duo with Amazon Q, creating a unified developer experience. By combining DevSecOps processes with Amazon Q's autonomous agents, the offering aims to enhance security measures within organizations. This collaboration seeks to provide a comprehensive AI-powered DevSecOps platform for seamless workflow integration.

news.headline: Zachary Levi's Nerd HQ partners with TimelyCare to offer free mental health therapy to 400 individuals.
news.summary: In an announcement made on December 3, 2024, in Los Angeles, it was revealed that actor Zachary Levi, in collaboration with his nonprofit organization Nerd HQ, has joined forces with TimelyCare, a virtual health and wellness provider. This partnership aims to offer no-cost mental health therapy sessions to a total of 400 individuals. Nerd HQ's primary objective has continuously centered on assisting individuals in managing their well-being.

news.headline: New Level Work introduces Skills Training mode with access to over 30 leadership courses via AI solution Leora.
news.summary: Today, in San Francisco, New Level Work introduced an innovative leadership development solution that integrates human coaching and artificial intelligence. This unique approach offers scalability, measurability, and affordability, setting it apart in the market. The company's latest addition, Skills Training mode, grants users unlimited entry to 30+ leadership development training courses. Leora, the AI component, encompasses Goal Setting, Leadership Coaching, Roleplay, and Q&A modes, offering a comprehensive learning experience.

news.headline: Adobe will announce Q4 and FY2024 earnings on Dec. 11 after market close, with a conference call for investors.
news.summary: Technology company Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on December 11, 2024, after the market closure. An investor conference call is scheduled to take place from 2-3 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day. The conference call will be broadcasted live on the Adobe Investor Relations Site. Subsequently, post the call, a recording along with relevant materials will be accessible on the site for interested parties. Adobe employs its website as a primary platform for material company dissemination.

news.headline: Sangoma Technologies to present at 13th Annual Discovery Investor Conference in New York City on Dec 11, 2024.
news.summary: Sangoma Technologies Corporation (TSX: STC; Nasdaq: SANG), a leading provider of cloud-based Communications as a Service solutions for businesses, revealed its participation in The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11th, 2024. The event, to take place at the New York Athletic Club in New York City, serves as a platform for emerging growth companies to engage with investors. Sangoma continues to establish itself as a trusted leader in the industry.

news.headline: ActivTrak's Daniel Glickman wins AI Marketing Innovation Award for 2024 by Product Marketing Alliance in Austin.
news.summary: Daniel Glickman, the Senior Director of Product Marketing, spearheaded a team dedicated to speeding up delivery processes and enhancing efficiency using AI in Austin, Texas. On December 3, 2024, ActivTrak revealed that Glickman had been recognized for his efforts, achieving significant milestones in AI Marketing.

news.headline: TikTok Shop rakes in over $100M on Black Friday amidst uncertain future due to potential ban. Live shopping strategy pays off in US.
news.summary: TikTok Shop achieved over $100 million in sales on Black Friday, indicating that the social media platform's venture into live shopping in the US is proving successful. The Shop e-commerce platform was launched in the fall of 2023, with a focus on encouraging creators and sellers to embrace the live shopping trend, which has proven to be lucrative in markets like China. Nico Le Bourgeois, the head of US operations for TikTok Shop, highlighted the goal of introducing customers to new products and unique shopping experiences through live shopping events. The success of TikTok Shop on Black Friday exemplifies the growing potential of live shopping in the US market.

news.headline: Macron assures French govt can withstand no-confidence vote despite challenges.
Hims & Hers named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list for Health Products category, celebrating exceptional achievements.
news.summary: A health and wellness platform called Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (NYSE: HIMS) based in San Francisco has recently been included in the Inc. 2024 Best in Business list under the Health Products category. The platform has been recognized for its outstanding contributions and impact on their industry and society. This annual award by Inc. highlights companies that have excelled in their respective fields.[['Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (NYSE: HIMS), based in San Francisco, has been named on the Inc. 2024 Best in Business list for Health Products. The platform has been acknowledged for its remarkable impact on their industry and society, celebrating exceptional companies making a difference. Inc.'s Best in Business award recognizes outstanding businesses annually.']]

news.headline: Bitcoin miner CleanSpark reported solid Q4 results, with a 187% YoY increase in total deployed capacity, stocks down. Analyst remains bullish with price target of $27.
news.summary: Shares of CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ: CLSK) saw a decline on Tuesday following the company's positive fourth-quarter results announcement. Despite this, the company, which operates as a Bitcoin mining firm, received praise from analysts. HC Wainwright's analyst, Mike Colonnese, maintained a Buy rating with a price target of $27 for CLSK. Colonnese noted that CleanSpark had a successful fiscal 2024, showcasing a strong performance with a 187% increase in total deployed capacity compared to the previous year. The company's capacity stood at 27.6 EH/s by September. CleanSpark was recognized for its fleet efficiency improvements during the period. More insights on this can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GSA debuts Prism platform for traceability and assurance with Wholechain. Launch includes webinar series.
news.summary: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire on December 3, 2024, the Global Seafood Alliance (GSA) unveiled Prism, a cutting-edge platform developed in collaboration with Wholechain. Prism offers robust assurance and traceability solutions for the seafood industry. To mark the platform's debut, GSA and Wholechain will jointly organize a traceability event.

news.headline: ImageTrend gains new partnerships with Midlothian FD & Woodlands FD in Texas, opting for Elite platform for efficiency.
news.summary: Lakeville, Minnesota - A recent announcement from ImageTrend disclosed new collaborations in Texas, with the Midlothian Fire Department and the Woodlands Fire Department opting for the Elite platform. This move is set to improve their operational effectiveness and streamline data management processes. The partnerships herald a significant step forward for ImageTrend in Texas.

news.headline: Article provides 5 tips for better sleep. Quality sleep crucial for health. Published on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024 in Mission, Kansas, a press release emphasized the significance of quality sleep for overall health. The body recharges during sleep, making it vital to get an adequate amount. Quality sleep not only leads to feeling refreshed but also supports good health. It is crucial to prioritize getting enough sleep for optimal well-being.

news.headline: Explore gaming gifts this holiday season for a joyful gifting experience. Enjoy the excitement with loved ones.
news.summary: In Mission, Kansas, on December 3, 2024, it was highlighted that one of the greatest joys during the holiday season is discovering the ideal gift and witnessing the sheer delight as your special someone unwraps it. For those who are on the hunt for that perfect present and have gaming enthusiasts in mind, a few important pointers were shared.

news.headline: Ecommerce trends for 2025: 5 shaping online selling. Explosion in online shopping over 2 decades brings abundance of products and services.
news.summary: MISSION, Kan., Dec. 3, 2024 - The future of online selling is being influenced by five key trends. With the rise of ecommerce in the last 20 years, consumers now have access to a wide range of products and services online. These trends are shaping the landscape of online selling, offering new opportunities for businesses.

news.headline: Global nutraceutical market expected to exceed USD 895.76 billion by 2031, with a predicted CAGR of 7.5%.
news.summary: In a recent report by The Insight Partners, it has been highlighted that the global nutraceuticals market is experiencing substantial growth. The report forecasts market strategies, top players, growth opportunities, and analysis leading up to 2031. The surge in growth is attributed to a growing consumer emphasis on health and wellness. The report provides valuable insights into this market segment as it continues to expand.

news.headline: AIRIA selects top Texas homebuilders for 5,700-acre COLTON project in Montgomery County, TX, aiming for new generations to prosper.
news.summary: Located in Montgomery County, TX, spanning across 5,700 acres, COLTON™ is a new development surrounded by a fragrant forest and Texas stars. This space is envisioned as a hub for future generations of Texans to establish themselves and chase their dreams. With its vast size and promising opportunities, COLTON™ offers a unique setting for individuals to grow and thrive in the heart of Texas.

news.headline: Therap Services releases schedule for 2025 National Conference, focusing on topics for Long-Term Services and Supports industry.
news.summary: In Torrington, Connecticut on December 3, 2024, Therap Services, a prominent provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for organizations in the Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS) and Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) sectors, announced significant advancements. Therap Services leads in providing electronic documentation solutions for the LTSS, HCBS, and other human services industries across the nation.

news.headline: Okami Medical appoints Bill Hoffman to board of directors. New member announced on December 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Aliso Viejo, California, Okami Medical, a medical device company at the commercial stage, revealed the addition of Bill Hoffman to its Board of Directors. The selection of Bill Hoffman was praised by Rhonda Robb, Okami's President and CEO.

news.headline: Defiance introduces leveraged ETF (NVOX) focused on Novo Nordisk, offering double daily exposure to stock price changes.
news.summary: Defiance ETFs has launched NVOX on NASDAQ, the first single-stock leveraged ETF focusing on Novo Nordisk A/S. This ETF, listed under NYSE:NVO, provides retail investors with double the daily exposure to Novo Nordisk's stock price fluctuations without needing a margin account. This new trading option is innovative, but NVOX carries increased risk since it is concentrated on a single stock and doesn't directly invest in Novo Nordisk shares. The key highlight is the potential for amplified gains or losses tied to Novo Nordisk's performance. Sylvia Jablonski, Defiance ETFs CEO, underlined the significance of this strategic move. This development coincides with ongoing efforts by large pharmaceutical companies to push for revisions to the Biden-era Medicare drug price negotiation law during the Trump administration. For further details, refer to the complete coverage accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 1-800-STRIPER® franchise launches in St. Louis Metro East, offering affordable paved lot maintenance services.
news.summary: A new franchise of 1-800-STRIPER® has been launched in St. Louis Metro East on December 3, 2024. This franchise offers an economical solution for restoring commercial and industrial parking lots and other paved areas. The service provides property owners with the opportunity to improve the appearance and functionality of their properties. This initiative aims to cater to the needs of business and property owners in the region by offering affordable maintenance services.

news.headline: MoXi and Pacaso partner to improve global homeownership access; targeting buyers in Mexico.
news.summary: In San Jose del Cabo, Mexico, on December 3, 2024, MoXi, a prominent provider of technology-driven global mortgages, has formed a strategic alliance with Pacaso, a platform offering co-ownership opportunities for high-end vacation properties. This partnership is designed to improve the accessibility to homeownership for prospective buyers in Mexico.

news.headline: AT&T aiming for $22 billion annual investment through 2027. Modernizing 5G network, targeting 300 million coverage by 2026. Fiber network to reach 50 million locations by 2029. Adjusted EPS guidance raised to $2.20 - $2.25 for 2024. Wireless service revenue expected to grow by 3% and broadband by over 7%.
news.summary: AT&T Inc. is seeing an uptick in shares following its announcement regarding its 2024 guidance and future plans. They are focusing on modernizing their 5G wireless network, aiming to switch to open, high-capacity technology by 2027. This network, equipped with deep mid-band 5G spectrum, is projected to cover more than 300 million individuals by the close of 2026. In broadband, AT&T is expanding its already significant fiber network in the U.S. with plans to reach over 50 million locations by 2029. Concurrently, the company is looking to phase out its legacy copper network operations across a majority of its wireline footprint by the end of 2029. Notably, AT&T anticipates adjusted EPS for 2024 to be between $2.20 and $2.25, slightly higher than the prior estimate of $2.15 to $2.25. They forecast growth in wireless service revenue in the 3% range and over 7% in broadband. The company also expects an increase in adjusted EBITDA...

news.headline: TimelyCare awarded "Best in Business" for Mental Health Advocacy by Inc. on Dec 3, 2024. Empowering higher education with virtual health services.
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas, on Dec. 3, 2024 - TimelyCare, a top virtual health and well-being provider in higher education, has been recognized on Inc.'s "Best in Business" list for 2024. Through enhancing availability of premium medical and mental health services, TimelyCare aims to empower individuals.

news.headline: China Clean Expo 2025 organized by IM Sinoexpo and supported by ISSA will be held from March 31st to April 3rd at SNIEC in Shanghai.
news.summary: Shanghai will host the 26th China Clean Expo (CCE) from March 31st to April 3rd, 2025, at the Shanghai New International Expo Center (SNIEC). The event, organized by IM Sinoexpo and supported by ISSA, the global cleaning industry association, will feature a range of cleaning products and solutions. This expo is a significant platform for industry professionals, with an expected attendance of thousands from various sectors.

news.headline: Stock market has lack of sellers, volume is low. China retaliates against U.S by banning exports. Mp Materials Corp profits.
news.summary: The article discusses the current state of the stock market, noting a lack of sellers which has led to a bullish environment with minimal resistance for the market to move higher. Reasons for the lack of sellers include a desire to defer taxes until 2025, extremely positive sentiment, retail investor complacency, and professionals waiting for year-end actions by underperforming money managers. The chart indicates the stock market is overbought according to the Relative Strength Index (RSI). China's response to U.S. sanctions includes banning the export of certain materials crucial in semiconductor manufacturing, benefiting companies like Mp Materials Corp whose stock has risen by 13%. The article also mentions the upcoming release of JOLTS job openings data which could impact the market.

news.headline: Conexus Recruiting acquires CV Resources, boosting its staffing expertise. Acquisition centered on finance and accounting services. Los Angeles, Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: Announced on December 3, 2024, in Los Angeles, Conexus Recruiting, a prominent recruitment and staffing solutions company, has successfully acquired CV Resources, a well-respected staffing firm specializing in finance and accounting services. This acquisition marks a significant achievement for Conexus Recruiting as they aim to strengthen their presence in the industry.

news.headline: Jaguar ad controversy stirs attention, says CEO, aiming for high visibility.
Graystone Capital Advisors closes deal for new Tractor Supply Co in LakeCity, FL for $8,016,260, 98% of list price. Multiple offers received.
news.summary: A recently built Tractor Supply Co in LakeCity, FL, was successfully sold for $8,016,260, reaching 98% of the list price. The sale was managed by Graystone Capital Advisors, a prominent investment sales brokerage. The transaction attracted multiple offers, with Julius Swolsky and Shannon Bona playing key roles as representatives. The seller was a well-known national developer, while the buyer was a private investor based in the Midwest.

news.headline: BlackRock to acquire HPS Investment Partners for $12 billion through equity exchange, with 13.7 million shares to be issued.
news.summary: BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE:BLK) saw an increase in shares trading today following the company's announcement of a definitive agreement to purchase HPS Investment Partners for approximately $12 billion. The acquisition will be paid entirely in BlackRock equity through "SubCo Units" issued by a BlackRock subsidiary, with an exchange rate of one-for-one into BlackRock common stock. At the closing, around 9.2 million SubCo Units will be paid, while 25% (2.9 million SubCo Units) will be deferred for five years based on certain conditions. An additional 1.6 million SubCo Units could be earned through financial milestones, potentially resulting in the issuance of roughly 13.7 million BlackRock shares. This move aims to combine BlackRock's established corporate and asset owner relationships with HPS's specialized expertise. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Chandra Srivastava is promoted to Chief Revenue Officer at Calque in Austin, Texas due to company growth.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Dr. Chandra Srivastava, a highly regarded member of the Calque team, has assumed the position of Chief Revenue Officer as the company experiences significant growth.

news.headline: AI now handles some tasks in AQR's Cliff Asness job - CNBC
Unison’s 2024 Home Equity Report shows 4.5% national home price increase; 45 states see equity gains.
news.summary: A new report reveals that there has been a significant 4.5% year-over-year increase in national home prices. This growth is widespread, with 45 states experiencing gains in home equity. Connecticut and New Jersey stand out as leaders in this increase. The data comes from Unison, a company known for its innovative equity sharing agreements. The report, titled the 2024 Annual Home Equity Report, highlights the positive trend in the housing market, indicating a strong overall performance.
